name: ScanInput
description: ScanInput schema from Amazon DynamoDB API

TableName.description: The name of the table to scan

IndexName.description: The name of a secondary index to scan

FilterExpression.description: A string that contains conditions for filtering the scan results

ProjectionExpression.description: A string that identifies attributes to retrieve

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: Substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ExpressionAttributeValues.description: Values that can be substituted in an expression

Limit.description: The maximum number of items to evaluate

ExclusiveStartKey.description: The primary key of the first item that this operation evaluates

Segment.description: For parallel scan, identifies the segment to be scanned

TotalSegments.description: For parallel scan, the total number of segments

Select.description: The attributes to be returned in the result
